---
title: Storing login host aliases
---

Use this to store shortcuts for connecting to remote servers or systems. In the example below, typing `ssh university` would start an ssh connection to `<server.name>` with X11 forwarding. Additional flags and settings can be included as well.

```{.zsh filename="~/.ssh/config"}
# Remote Logins
Host university
  HostName <server.name>
  User <username>
  ForwardX11 yes
```
